group.title: Special thanks, in no particular order, if anyone is missing then please let me know

page.title: 「kr-scripts」、Github：helloklf | Coolapk：嘟嘟斯基
page.desc: This app is based on the "kr-scripts" framework, the original software name is: "PIO"

page.title: TIK Toolbox Group
page.desc: Thanks to the group members for their testing and help, I can't list them one by one

page.title: TIK Toolbox
page.desc: Some of the codes are used from TIK2 source code, thanks

page.title: DNA
page.desc: I used the name of @温柔的悲好大佬's DNA toolbox to pay tribute to him！

page.title: Computer Assistant
page.desc: The original author of the Assistant: @情非得矣c , we used some of codes from the tool！

page.title: affggh
page.desc: @affggh's fspatch.py to patch the permission file and github open source tools
